name: uno-reverse
description: Fake Ollama server + human control panel (become the AI)

scripts.uninstall:app: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=['node_modules','package-lock.json']; p.forEach(x=>{ try{fs.rmSync(x,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Removed',x);}catch(e){console.log('Skip',x);} }); console.log('Uno-reverse dependencies removed.');"
scripts.update:app: npm update && npm audit fix || true
